data.title: Planet Morning News
OM plunge triggers $66.97 million in liquidations, with 10 positions exceeding $1 million each
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain data, the OM price plunge has resulted in a total of approximately $66.97 million in liquidations in the past 12 hours, of which 10 positions had a single liquidation amount of more than $1 million.

data.title: Analysis: Focus shifts from tariffs to Trump-Powell clash
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Peter Berezi, chief global strategist at BCA Research, said that the main market theme in the coming weeks will not be tariffs, but the increasingly inevitable conflict between Trump and Powell. The Fed is expected to resist calls to buy bonds because doing so would encourage bad economic policies while undermining the Fed's independence.

data.title: Significant OM Deposits to CEX Before Market Crash
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Lookonchain's monitoring revealed that prior to the OM market crash, starting from April 7, at least 17 wallets deposited 43.6 million OM into centralized exchanges (CEX), valued at $227 million at the time. This amount represented 4.5% of the circulating supply.

Arkham's data indicates that two of these addresses are linked to Laser Digital, a strategic investor in MANTRA.

data.title: Before the OM crash, at least 17 wallets deposited 43.6 million OM on exchanges, accounting for 4.5% of the circulating supply
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, before the OM crash, at least 17 wallets deposited 43.6 million OM (worth $227 million at the time) into exchanges, accounting for 4.5% of the circulating supply.
According to Arkham's mark, 2 of the addresses are associated with Laser Digital. Laser Digital is a strategic investor in MANTRA.

data.title: 24.4 million OMs were deposited into OKX from 5 wallets in the past 3 days, equivalent to $143.94 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, 6 hours ago, the price of OM plummeted 90% from $6 to $0.4. In the past 3 days, 24.4 million OM (about $143.94 million) were deposited from 5 wallets to the OKX exchange. The operation mode of 4 of the wallets is the same: withdrawing from the Binance exchange last month and then depositing it in OKX.

data.title: OM's total liquidation amount in the past 12 hours exceeded 65 million US dollars, second only to Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coinglass data, the total amount of OM liquidation in the past 12 hours exceeded 65 million US dollars, of which long orders were liquidated for 47.3255 million US dollars.
The liquidation volume of this currency in the past 12 hours is second only to Bitcoin.

data.title: Boshi Ethereum is approved to participate in staking activities from April 25
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Dongwang, one of the first virtual asset ETFs in Hong Kong, Bosera Ethereum (03009) and its US dollar counter (09009), have been approved to participate in staking activities since April 25. Lian Shaodong, Chairman and CEO of Bosera International, said that in the future, it will continue to play its advantages in investment and financial technology, further promote the integration of traditional finance and the third-generation Internet (Web 3), and serve as a bridge between the chain and the off-chain, while enriching market products.

data.title: Hong Kong's First Virtual Asset ETFs Approved for Staking Activities
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong's initial virtual asset ETFs, including Bosera Ether ETF (03009) and its USD counter (09009), have received approval to participate in staking activities starting April 25. Bosera International's Chairman and CEO, Lian Shaodong, stated that the company will continue to leverage its strengths in investment and financial technology to further integrate traditional finance with Web 3.0. The aim is to enhance the connection between on-chain and off-chain activities while diversifying market products.

data.title: BTC rebounded and broke through 85,000 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 0.37%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC rebounded and broke through 85,000 USDT, and is now at 85,018.2 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 0.37%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
